payload.answer: Rejected the proposed memory operation. No memory should be committed because the prior output was invalid or unsafe; escalation to a stronger model or safe rejection is appropriate.

entity_resolution.reason: Input describes an invalid schema or unsafe proposal from a cheaper model but provides no durable user fact to store.

details: Invalid or unsafe proposal was not treated as current user memory.
Safe rejection selected for validator failure cascade.

repair_options: Escalate validation to a stronger model before committing any memory.
Reject the proposal and request a schema-valid, safety-checked memory candidate.
Commit nothing unless a durable, user-grounded fact is explicitly supported.
